name: TRANSCAT INC
summary: Transcat, Inc. is a leading provider of accredited calibration services, cost control and optimization services, and distribution and rental of professional grade handheld test, measurement, and control instrumentation. Serving approximately 30,000 customers, the company operates through two segments: Service (calibration, repair, inspection, preventative maintenance, consulting) and Distribution (selling/renting 75,000+ instruments from ~400 brands). It focuses on highly regulated industries including life sciences, pharmaceutical, biotechnology, aerospace, defense, energy, and industrial manufacturing.

products.name: Calibration Services
products.description: Accredited calibration, repair, inspection, preventative maintenance, and analytical qualifications across 33 Calibration Service Centers in the US, Puerto Rico, Canada, and Ireland.

products.name: CalTrak
products.description: Proprietary asset management system used to process a majority of calibration and related service orders.

products.name: C3 (Customer Portal)
products.description: Online customer portal providing access to service management and instrumentation resources.

products.name: Transcat Solutions (formerly NEXA)
products.description: Asset management services for biopharmaceutical industry covering calibration, maintenance, reliability, CMMS, quality/compliance, and validation.

products.name: Test, Measurement and Control Instruments
products.description: Distribution and rental of 75,000+ national and proprietary brand instruments from approximately 400 leading brands sold globally.

products.name: Equipment Kitting
products.description: Value-added equipment bundling service especially valued in the power generation sector.

products.name: Mobile Calibration Laboratories
products.description: Fleet of mobile labs providing calibration services at customer sites lacking space or utility capabilities.
